observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the affected-only plan bound every owner to every functional input consumed by its command
observed_failure.observed_result: 44 owners passed, but the privacy owner found machine-specific absolute paths in a tracked OpenSpec evidence file that was absent from the privacy owner's semantic input components

classification.error_signature: privacy command scans tracked and unignored-untracked candidates beyond its declared semantic input set

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the privacy command dynamically enumerated the complete Git public candidate set, while its owner identity consumed only installation-copy components, the facade script, and .gitignore
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model and regression matrix had changed or added one public candidate outside the installation projection and asserted that only the privacy owner became stale
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: the exact public candidate membership and bytes are one owner-scoped target-input role consumed only by owner:self:public-export-privacy
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: git_public_candidates -> self-host target-input role -> frozen TestMesh owner identity -> privacy command -> immutable owner receipt

generalized_repair.rule: derive the request role and privacy scan from one candidate enumeration, bind the complete role only to the privacy owner, and reject generic machine-local absolute paths
generalized_repair.observed_regression: the historical OpenSpec evidence paths are replaced by portable repository tokens and the current public export scan passes
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: adding, removing, or changing a public candidate changes the privacy role fingerprint while unrelated owners remain reusable through the existing owner-scoped target-input model
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: do not hash the public candidate role into every owner, do not broaden an unmapped change to run-all, and do not add a second candidate reader or fallback scan

required_revalidation: focused privacy path and candidate enumeration regressions
compiled owner declaration and TestMesh affected-plan regression
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed currentness
affected-only frozen owner execution and parent aggregation
